basic_details.job_title: OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Head Cook and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Support Staff (Warden, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper, Head Cook, Assistant Cook)
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Bhadrak has released the official Support Staff (Warden, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper, Head Cook, Assistant Cook) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 02/2026 at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Official Website. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 60 years with qualifications such as HSC, B.A/B.Sc, and relevant experience can apply offline up to 10 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Warden: Minimum Age 30 years, Maximum Age 60 years. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: Minimum Age 21 years, Maximum Age 32 years. Head Cook: Minimum Age 30 years, Maximum Age 40 years. Assistant Cook: Minimum Age 21 years, Maximum Age 32 years.

qualification.details: Warden: B.A / B.Sc from any recognized University. Male for Boys' hostel and Female for Girls' hostel. At least 02 years in hostel management. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: Must have passed HSC Examination. Male Only. Head Cook: Male for Boys' hostel and Female for Girls' hostel. Trained in cookery preferred. Assistant Cook: Male for Boys' hostel and Female for Girls' hostel. Having experience in cooking and other characteristics as specified for Head Cook.

salary_details.details: Warden: Rs. 21,175/- per month Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: Rs. 7,500/- per month Head Cook: Rs. 9,000/- per month Assistant Cook: Rs. 6750/- per month

selection_process: Application submission by registered post Verification of documents Interview/Selection by respective School Level Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bhadrak.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff positions is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Support Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for various Support Staff positions, including Warden, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper, Head Cook, and Assistant Cook.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post is passing the HSC Examination.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Warden post is between 30 to 60 years. Candidates must fall within this age bracket to be eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the OAVs Bhadrak Support Staff recruitment is strictly Offline. Applications must be sent via registered post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Cook position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Cook position is Rs. 6750/- per month. This is a contractual appointment.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any experience required for the Head Cook post?
faq.answer: While specific educational qualifications are not detailed, candidates for the Head Cook post are preferred if they are trained in cookery. Experience in cooking is also implied.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply by email or in person at the OAV Office?
faq.answer: No, you cannot apply by email or submit the application forms in the OAV Office. Applications must be sent only by registered post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form and find more details?
faq.answer: The application form and other details can be downloaded from the district website: https://bhadrak.odisha.gov.in/ or www:oav.edu.in/?GROUPCODE=OAVUTB.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application submission by registered post, verification of documents, and an interview or selection by the respective School Level Selection Committee.
